storyInfo: Nasti finds Ferne and asks about her foster mother, discovering that Væla is near death, and came here for Nasti. Meanwhile, the Maylander Emergency Management Council quickly takes over Propeller Paradise, and Nasti is taken away.

attributes.content: A small sandbeast in the forest caught my attention. My knowledge told me that this creature usually makes its habitat in the barrens.
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: The frightened beast escaped into the bushes. I pursued it through thorn and briar, driven by curiosity, and found myself gazing upon an unexpected landscape...
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: Do you see it, Fenny?
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: Yeah!
attributes.name: Daughter

attributes.content: The great desert and the sky, pink where they meet on the horizon. It's totally different from the pictures in the textbooks.
attributes.name: Daughter

attributes.content: It smells sweet.
attributes.name: Daughter

attributes.content: Heh, that's your mom baking cupcakes. They'll be ready soon.
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: Tell me again about your adventures in the eastern wasteland... no, tell me about the city in the sky!
attributes.name: Daughter

attributes.content: There's no rush, Fenny. We have plenty of time, and plenty of adventures to talk about.
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: You'll see everything that I've ever seen, when you grow up and your feet become quicker, I promise.
attributes.name: Father

attributes.content: Stop spinning tall tales to my clients!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Don't blame me for you being boring, trainee. They like my stories better.
attributes.name: Martin Barn

attributes.content: My job is to take clients to see places that actually exist.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You think only the places that your company marked exist? What about the things I saw in my youth?
attributes.name: Martin Barn

attributes.content: I told you, you shouldn't just read from your tourist manual. You need to walk a path that no one has ever seen—
attributes.name: Martin Barn

attributes.content: And achieve nothing in life, get laughed at by the neighbors, and spend my old age spinning tall tales to children?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I believed your stories—the flying beckbeast, floating city, golden-pink deserts... they'll always be precious memories.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: But you believe in your stories too much.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Ferne! *cough* Come back here!
attributes.name: Martin Barn

attributes.content: Congratulations, Miss Ferne Barn. Your application has been approved. You are now the owner of an independent travel agency.
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Thank you. It's a big first step, even if it's a one-woman company!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: One woman? I thought there was another name on the application...?
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Martin Barn, my dad. Passed away last year.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I'm sorry...
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: No need to apologize. I wouldn't have decided to start my own travel agency, if not for him.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Even if we won't be able to travel together, Martin Barn will always be an important part of this company.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I'm sure he'd be glad. Have you decided your first route? I can recommend a few popular spots.
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Hm... is there someplace that no one's ever gone before?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Most of my peers think my slogan of going into the unknown is just a gimmick. Only my clients and I know how many wonderful sights we saw, and how many amazing things we did together.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Our destination was Propeller Paradise. I wanted to see what the future would be like, while my client had an ambiguous wish.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I swear I didn't mean to sabotage Rhine... my client wasn't in good shape, and you were the only other Banshee I knew of—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: No need to apologize. I'm not here to put you on trial. I just wanted to know who you and your client were.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'll be happy to read your autobiography, if you ever publish one. But right now, time is of the essence.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You're worried about the hearing? I don't think the investigation is complete yet, since they keep pushing the date back.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The trial will come sooner than you think.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Tell me about your Banshee client, as succinctly as you can. When did you meet? Why did you come here? And... how is her health?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It was two months ago, in the Bleached Wasteland...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Brrr... it's really cold at night. The sand's black, completely different from what dad said.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The outskirts of the Bleached Wasteland aren't as scary as the stories say. My flesh hasn't been ripped from my bones, and I haven't heard the ghosts of the dead wailing.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Wait, what's that shadow on the slope? Don't tell me there actually are ghosts here...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Is this... Columbia?
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: 'Guide.'
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: Gui-*cough*... guide...
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: Are you alright?!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Pulse and breathing, normal. Doesn't seem like dehydration... well, can't hurt to try.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Am I... back in the Convallis?
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: No... I haven't seen her yet... do not mourn me... I must not roost...
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: Calm down. Do you remember your name?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: No...
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: Where are you going?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You're in the Bleached Wasteland, in Columbia. Do you remember what you're here for?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Wasteland...?
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: No... she's not here...
attributes.name: Feeble Banshee

attributes.content: What are you looking for? Maybe I can help. Ferne's Tours will fulfill your every wish, even the ones you think won't come true, and our prices are fair and reasonable!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: My dad always said that if it hasn't come true yet, there's always a chance. He also said... ma'am? Ma'am!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: She's lost consciousness. Feather horns... what's this Banshee looking for, and how did she get lost in the Bleached Wasteland?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What are these floating symbols? What language is this? And these golden patterns carrying tiny leaves... is this her Arts?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The leaves are moving... pointing towards D.C.?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Her memory got fuzzier and fuzzier. I didn't know what was wrong with her and I got desperate.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You can't stop time.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's a symptom of age? But her memories...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I've seen this before in the Convallis. It goes hand-in-hand with death.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: If a Banshee who's starting to lose her memory showed up here, then perhaps...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It's her last wish to keep what's left of her mind together.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Do you mean...?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You're trying to fulfill her dying wish.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: She came all the way to Columbia, walked through the Bleached Wasteland on foot, just to fulfill her final wish?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: What is she looking for? An object, a truth, or someone she cared about?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: I see...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Every cop on Propeller Paradise is looking for you. Rhine needs to give everyone an explanation.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: This delayed hearing is extremely important to you, yet you came to look for a guide you've only met in passing, asking about her client...
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Unless you already know who she's looking for, or—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Is it you she came to Columbia for?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Thank you for caring for my mother, Ferne.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: She must still be somewhere on Propeller Paradise! I'll help you look for her!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: We're out of time.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Please come with us, Director Lunorey.
A few more minutes, please... wait, your uniform... it's not Tannen who sent you.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The Maylander Emergency Management Council? Your new uniforms look just like the old ones.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The Council has completed its investigation concerning the flight of the illegal device that occurred last night. Please accompany us to verify the findings.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Please communicate any objections that you may have, to avoid unnecessary misunderstandings and waste of time at the hearing.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: The investigation is complete... then why hasn't the hearing started? We've been waiting for seven hours!
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: The hearing is delayed, but the trial has already begun.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I can understand if a scientist doesn't like to talk. Have YOU forgotten how to speak too?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: I remember how I was on the shortlist for promotion. The next day, you transferred an official of the same rank over from HQ.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: He was young, superb... made all the candidates uneasy. We climbed over each other to prove to you that we were the best one for the job.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Same old story, isn't it?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: In the end, you were the one who got the promotion.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: I was supposed to get it!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Nothing is ever 'supposed' to happen, kid.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: You really think the chief executive of Propeller Paradise is an important post? No, people will only remember the one who gives the opening address.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: It doesn't necessarily have to be you.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Gordon has his eyes on the Kuranta behind Gustave. The spikes on the Savra's tail rise up on their ends, swaying conspicuously. He is on guard.
He knows that Gustave is intentionally agitating his competitiveness, but after so many years at ATAO, he just can't stop himself from provoking his competitors.
In order to leave ATAO, he took on tasks that were not his job, pulled strings everywhere, and bowed his head to Gustave, his tormentor.
He must not stop now.
What do you think Rhine's device is, Mr. Consultant?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Mm. Maybe a variation of a floating botanical unit?
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: Excuses—
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: No, no. Floating botanical units are electrical cables in the sky. Light weight and mobility are paramount.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: What did I see on my way here...? Two empty slots on the tree's internal activator.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: My guess is—
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Oh, anyone can tell it's waiting for two 'keys'.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: It doesn't look like the tree will fully activate until a second Rhine Lab section director is present. Unless someone else sneaks into Propeller Paradise unnoticed...
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: What do you mean...?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: People might have many theories and speculations about this device because of its appearance and the Rhine name, but I see nothing more than a flying 'tree', Mr. Gustave.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: Are you done? We're not here to write Rhine's paper for them.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: The delayed hearing has bought us time. But the reason Nasti concealed the tree's existence, how Ferne sneaked in, and my side hustle... everything needs an explanation.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Enough. Impatience is a sign of fear, and questions are a sign of incompetence.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Our consultant here has already given us the answer.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Rhine's device is pretty low-risk, but also invites all kinds of speculation. Therefore, our definition of it can be as big or as small as we want it to be.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: What else do you need me to do, sir?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Do as you're told.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: All you need to do is what you're told.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Stop pushing!
attributes.name: Company Representative

attributes.content: P-Please, let me through, I have something to ask the desk...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Don't waste your time. They don't know when the hearing is.
attributes.name: Company Representative

attributes.content: I just want to know if I should come forward to the investigation...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Listen, we're impatient too. No one can do anything to move the hearing process forward, unless you're actually involved in the case.
attributes.name: Company Representative

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Let me guess. You took out a 'Sky Loan', didn't you?
attributes.name: Company Representative

attributes.content: Yes... there were six grocers like me back home. We spent our days betting drinks on the direction that tumbleweed rolled, until two years ago...
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: The sky, the Starpod, life free of Originium, a brand-new frontier for Columbia... I didn't understand a thing that the TV and newspapers said, but I saw the light that night.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I sold my shop, abandoned my wife, took out a huge loan, and went into Propeller Paradise without ever looking back.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: I've already heard a dozen stories like that today. Take a banner and go join the protest instead of hanging your head here.
attributes.name: Company Representative

attributes.text: Aspen looks down at the protest banner in his hand. The fabric is silver, a reflective material commonly used by flying machines.
Lucky Cystybeast's furniture uses the same materials too. Aspen does not understand how it became so popular so quickly. The sofa reflects his face whenever he walks past it. It is patently absurd.
Yet the sight of the silvery fabric also causes his heart to leap, as though the future is really in his hands, and luck is really on his side.

attributes.content: I'll make it... I'll make it through this hearing.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Even if I'm put on trial and thrown in jail, I'll make sure the name Lucky Cystybeast and my exhibits stay on Propeller Paradise, where everybody can see them.
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: Things will turn out fine. Lucky Cystybeast will bring me luck!
attributes.name: Aspen

attributes.content: He's never been late before... was he delayed by the protests, or did he get lost on the way?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The structure of Propeller Paradise is certainly complex, but it's not so hard to understand if we see it as a massive Wrankwood film set.
I remember the pioneer-era classics that you starred in. People still think your metal body was some kind of special effect.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You have a good memory.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Transportation on the levitating layer is very interesting. The combination of steel wires and ball pods seems like some sort of amusement park.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I apologize for the delay. I had to make a few rounds to humor these three stooges.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I haven't had a chance to greet them yet.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: No need to be nervous. Young Maylander agents always attract too much attention. It takes someone with a calmer demeanor like you to play the part of a secretary. But I can't help but feel like you're starting to go too far with this seriousness thing.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Tannen isn't an easy customer, is he?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: He has... a personality. It's not hard to read.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Good work.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Your timing a few days ago was impeccable. A single squad eliminated two major risks before the exhibition. I'll be sure to make a note on your annual assessment.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I'm flattered.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The suspension of Propeller Paradise's administrative and engineering functions has created plenty of room for Maylander to operate.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Gustave's desire to work with us is clear. He has already sent people to deal with Rhine's devices, and he intends to personally instruct his subordinates.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I guess all that's left is a hearing to placate the public?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You have questions about the delay of the hearing, don't you?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: It's not like Maylander to stall.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Since when did you pick up an impatient streak? Everything happens in due course. We're not only here to investigate.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Such a beautiful, futuristic city. I leave Columbia for a few months, and all sorts of new stuff pop up.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: How long will it take to make a full round of the levitation layer?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Less than an hour by ropeway.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Very good. I would like to enjoy a nice view of Propeller Paradise before the hearing.
attributes.name: Tin Man
